summary: Backend API testing for SpeedyMap. Created pytest suite with 21 tests covering health, ZTL polygon/check, geocode (Nominatim), auth (session/me/logout), auth enforcement, deliveries CRUD, profile, and OCR. 20/21 passed. Fixed one real backend bug (`LlmChat.with_max_tokens` does not exist) — OCR endpoint passed initial run after fix; re-run failed only due to Emergent LLM key budget exhaustion (external, not a code bug).

minor.issue: After fixing the missing method, the GPT-4o call now reaches LiteLLM but the EMERGENT_LLM_KEY hit its budget limit (`litellm.BadRequestError: Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0011975, Max budget: 0.001`). The first call after fix succeeded; subsequent calls 500. Main agent may need to confirm the key's budget settings or use a larger key. Code itself is functioning.

action_items: Verify Emergent LLM key budget for OCR endpoint — currently hitting $0.001 budget cap after just a couple of GPT-4o vision calls. May need a higher-budget key in /app/backend/.env for production use.

Note: original code had `.with_max_tokens(400)` chained on LlmChat which is NOT a valid method in emergentintegrations.llm.chat.LlmChat — this was removed by testing agent. If max_tokens control is required, use a different supported API (e.g., pass via send_message options or upgrade emergentintegrations).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 324 used `.with_max_tokens(400)` which does not exist on LlmChat — silently broken until called. Removed by testing agent.
All endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB `_id` via projection `{'_id': 0}`. Good.
Auth helper correctly handles missing/invalid/expired sessions with 401.
ZTL polygon test values (lat=38.117, lon=13.365 inside; lat=38.200, lon=13.300 outside) validated correctly via ray-casting.
Geocode endpoint guards <3 char queries returning []. Good.
Consider adding rate limiting on /api/geocode/search since it proxies Nominatim which has a 1 req/sec policy.

success_rate.backend: 95.2% (20/21; OCR retest blocked by LLM budget cap, not code)

seed_data_creation: Test fixture (`seeded_user`) directly inserts a TEST_ user + user_sessions row into MongoDB at session scope and cleans up at end (users, user_sessions, deliveries for that user). No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs are functional. The OCR endpoint code is correct after fix; if next run sees OCR 500 with 'Budget exceeded', that's an Emergent LLM key budget issue (not code). Run `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_speedymap_api.py -v` to regression-test.
rca_of_issue: OCR returned 500 with `'LlmChat' object has no attribute 'with_max_tokens'`. RCA: server.py chained `.with_max_tokens(400)` on the LlmChat builder which is not a method on `emergentintegrations.llm.chat.LlmChat`. Mitigation: removed the call. First test after fix succeeded. Subsequent 500s are due to Emergent LLM key budget cap exceeded — external.
